name: rfp-scraper
description: Scrapes marketing-related RFPs from findrfp.com, rfpdb.com, rfpmart.com, philgeps.gov.ph, odwyerpr.com and (optionally) sam.gov, then deep-dives each listing for proposal-writing details (contact info, budget, scope of work).

scripts.all: npm run scrape && npm run deepdive
